info.description: API for subscribers, metering objects, contracts, and registry import.
info.title: Subscriber Service API

parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return; 0 means no limit
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Creates a contract between subscriber and metering object.

get.description: Returns latest contracts for several metering objects.
Returns the latest contract for a metering object.

parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return; 0 means no limit
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Creates a metering object with devices and seals.

get.description: Returns a metering object containing the specified device.
Returns a metering object containing the specified seal.

delete.description: Deletes a metering object by identifier.

get.description: Returns a metering object by identifier.

patch.description: Updates a metering object's main data.

post.description: Parses an Excel registry and imports subscribers, objects, devices, seals, and contracts.

parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return; 0 means no limit
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Search by surname, name, patronymic, account number, phone number, or address
parameters.name: search

parameters.description: Filter by subscriber status; 0 means all statuses
parameters.name: status

post.description: Creates a subscriber with passport data.

delete.description: Deletes subscriber and passport data by identifier.

get.description: Returns subscriber data with all related contracts and objects.
get.summary: Get subscriber with contracts and objects
